prompt: Silicone-free rinse-off hair conditioner for textured hair using a cationic emulsifier system, with rich slip, low buildup, and naturally derived positioning.

ingredients.name: Glyceryl Stearate
ingredients.notes: Naturally derived from glycerin and stearic acid

ingredients.name: Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil
ingredients.notes: Sustainably sourced, high in fatty acids

trade_offs.note: Balanced blend of naturally derived ingredients for optimal conditioning and moisturizing, while managing cost
Highly biodegradable and naturally derived ingredients minimize environmental impact, with a stable and consistent product performance
Optimized blend of cationic emulsifiers and moisturizers provides excellent slip and detangling, with minimal buildup on hair

regulatory_flags.flag: Compliant with EU Cosmetics Regulation, but verify supplier registration status
Screen for potential allergens and ensure sustainable sourcing
Compliant with FDA regulations, but ensure manufacturer follows GMP guidelines

result.disclaimer: This formulation is a first-pass concept and may require further development, testing, and optimization to ensure compliance with all applicable regulations and performance requirements.
